ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_notes: Text-based PDF, high quality, all fields clearly readable. Original certificate issued by West Sweden Chamber of Commerce.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_notes: Text-based PDF, high quality, all fields clearly readable. Single page invoice issued by Norex International AB.

lc_validation.motivation: The certificate contains the label 'LC NUMBER' followed by a specific number '0000222823011246'. 'LC NUMBER' is a separate label/field designation that constitutes a bank-term benaming per rule 2.2. The letters 'LC' are NOT merely part of a reference number but form a separate field label 'LC NUMBER'. This meets the activation criteria in avsnitt 2.2.

consignor_search_all_files.conclusion: Consignor name 'Norex International AB' found in invoice footer and as branding/logo in header.

criteria_checked.criterion: Certificate invoice reference matches invoice number
criteria_checked.detail: Certificate does not contain an explicit invoice number reference. The reference '6013820-1/C' in remarks corresponds to Sales Order number on the invoice, not a direct invoice number match.
Consignor 'Norex International AB' found in invoice footer and header branding.
Consignee 'NEW MOBARAK AND BROTHERS' found in both Delivery Address and Invoice Address fields.

pairing_validation.motivation: At least two of three pairing criteria are met (consignor and consignee identifiable in invoice). Document pair is valid.

rules_applied.rule_description: LC-undantag – ursprungsland ska verifieras vid LC

comparison_steps.detail: Certificate Box 3 states 'SWEDEN' as country of origin.

comparison_steps.action: Search for explicit origin field in invoice
comparison_steps.detail: Invoice contains dedicated field 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: SWEDEN'. Additionally, the body text states 'WE HEREBY CERTIFY THAT MERCHANDISE ARE OF SWEDEN ORIGIN'. Both are explicit origin declarations.
comparison_steps.result: SWEDEN found in explicit origin field

comparison_steps.detail: Certificate: SWEDEN. Invoice: SWEDEN. Exact match.

checkpoints.motivation: Certifikatets ursprungsland 'SWEDEN' (ruta 3) kan exakt identifieras i fakturans dedicerade ursprungsfält 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: SWEDEN'. Ingen normalisering krävs. Ursprungslandet förekommer även i fakturans textdeklaration 'WE HEREBY CERTIFY THAT MERCHANDISE ARE OF SWEDEN ORIGIN'. Verifieringskravet vid LC-undantag (avsnitt 2.2) är uppfyllt: ursprungslandet återfinns i ett explicit origin-fält i fakturan.
checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3 raw text: 'SWEDEN'. Invoice explicit origin field raw text: 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: SWEDEN'. Direct textual match. Additionally confirmed by 'WE HEREBY CERTIFY THAT MERCHANDISE ARE OF SWEDEN ORIGIN'. Rule 2.2 requires origin to be found in an explicit origin field in the invoice — 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: SWEDEN' is exactly such a field. No normalization required. Confidence 0.99.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Origin might be ambiguous due to LC transaction
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: The invoice explicitly states 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: SWEDEN' in a dedicated field, leaving no ambiguity.

rule_evaluation_log.detail: Certificate contains 'LC NUMBER 0000222823011246 DATE 230319' in box 6. 'LC NUMBER' is a separate field label constituting a bank-term designation. A specific LC number '0000222823011246' follows. All activation criteria per rule 2.2 are met. LC exception is active — only country of origin shall be verified.
Consignor 'Norex International AB' found in invoice footer. Consignee 'NEW MOBARAK AND BROTHERS' found in invoice address. At least 2 of 3 criteria met. Pairing valid.
Certificate origin 'SWEDEN' found in invoice explicit field 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: SWEDEN'.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Certifikatet innehåller en Letter of Credit-referens, vilket innebär att enbart ursprungsland behöver verifieras. Certifikatets ursprungsland 'Sweden' bekräftas av fakturans fält 'Country of Origin: Sweden'. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.
overall_assessment.summary_of_findings: LC exception activated based on 'LC NUMBER 0000222823011246' in certificate. Per rule 2.2, only country of origin was verified. Certificate states origin 'SWEDEN' in box 3, which is exactly confirmed by invoice's explicit 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: SWEDEN' field. All other checkpoints set to NOT_APPLICABLE per LC exception. All applicable checkpoints are MATCH.
decision_factors: LC exception correctly activated: certificate contains 'LC NUMBER' as separate bank-term label with specific number
Country of origin SWEDEN verified in explicit dedicated origin field in invoice
All non-origin checkpoints correctly set to NOT_APPLICABLE per rule 2.2
